news.t: State Street Investment Management Debuts Select Sector SPDR® Premium Income ETF Suite

overview.description: The State Street Utilities Select Sector SPDR Premium Income ETF (XLUI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Utilities Select Sector index. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that provides US Utilities sector exposure by investing in shares of the Utilities Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLU). Additionally, it aims to generate income through selling short-dated call options. XLUI was launched on Jul 29, 2025 and is issued by State Street.
